items.headline: Amid energy shock, ASEAN economy forges resilience through cooperation
items.body: Southeast Asian nations agreed on a collective response to Middle East instability. This creates a framework to manage regional energy, food, and financial shocks.

items.headline: Changing geopolitics are in focus as France's Macron kicks off Kenya visit for an Africa summit
items.body: France is holding a major African summit in an Anglophone country. This signals a strategic pivot from its traditional Francophone sphere of influence.

items.headline: South Africa's top court revives impeachment inquiry against president
items.body: South Africa’s highest court revived a presidential impeachment inquiry over a farm theft scandal. The ruling creates new political uncertainty for the governing African National Congress.

items.headline: EU foreign ministers to discuss new aspects of security guarantees for Ukraine on 11 May
items.body: EU ministers will discuss long-term security guarantees for Ukraine, including satellite monitoring. This moves European support beyond immediate aid to institutionalized security commitments.
